Name: Squire's Bracers
Functional Text: When your sword attack hits, you may destroy this. If you do, the sword's next attack this turn gets +2{p}.

Name: Cutting Couriers
Functional Text: When your sword attack hits, you may destroy this. If you do, the attack gets **go again**.

Name: Run Through
Functional Text:
Target sword attack gets **go again**.

Your next sword attack this turn gets +3{p}.

Name: Back for Seconds
Functional Text: Target sword attack gets +2{p}. If it's your second attack this turn, instead it gets +3{p}.

Name: Blade Rush
Functional Text:
Your first sword attack this turn gets **go again**.

Your second sword attack this turn gets +1{p}.

**Go again**

Name: Shove Off
Functional Text: Choose a non-equipment card defending a sword attack you control. Return it to its owner's hand.

Name: Steel on Steel
Functional Text: While this is defending a weapon attack, this gets +1{d}.
